title: MooseBlocks
description: This resource pack revamps Minecraft's visual style, giving your world a more stylized look. MooseBlocks stays true to the vanilla color palette, so your builds will look just as good as always!
body:
# You're Telling Me a Moose Made these Blocks?

Yes, yes I am, a Cosmic Moose to be more precise. I made this pack to be a perfect blend of stylized and minimal. My goal was to make a resource pack with a stronger aesthetic opinion than Vanilla's textures without falling into a specific theme, more minimal than Vanilla without being too bare bones. I made this pack using the colors from vanilla specifically so that any build that looks good in vanilla will look good with this pack on as well. If you enjoy my packs, please join the discord server and give feedback so I can improve them! 
### Key Features
- Full retextures of almost every block texture in vanilla minecraft
- 3D Lanterns and chains
- Connected textures for the glass blockset, as well as the nether portal
- Animated textures for some, previously static, blocks including the Observer.
- Custom models for some blocks, currently including the Enchanting Table and Dragon Egg.
- Custom fence models and textures for every wood type (and nether brick fences)
- Redstone QOL features similar to what can be found in Redstone Tweaks, but with a touch more whimsey.
- Randomized textures for some blocks including stone, sand and soul sand
- Emissive texture support with Continuity or Optifine (Optifine Untested)

### Recommended Mods
- Continuity: Required for connected and emissive textures
- Shine: Recommended settings: turn bloom intensity down to 2, enable edge light on plants.
- Better Clouds: Recommended Settings: Increase opacity to 80% increase daytime brightness to 120%
- Story Mode Clouds: recommended if you aren't using the Better Clouds Mod

### Upcoming features
- Mod support with the following being in my current plans:
  - Polytone
  - Visuality
  - Particular
  - Traveler's Backpacks
  - Comforts
  - Farmer's Delight
- More features may be added to the backlog with interest, but with the caveat that this is a passion project and real life will always take priority.

### My Other Projects
- [Moose UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mooseui) UI Overhaul: Beta Release
- [MooseGen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moose-gen) World Generation Overhaul: Beta Release.
- [Moose Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moose-items)
- ~~[MooseBlocks x Fabulous Fences](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mooseblocks-x-fabulous-fences) Highly recommended, this is the intended way to use the pack.~~ This pack is now deprecated as I have added my own take on custom models and textures to bring this feature into the main pack.
- [MooseMobs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moosemobs) Mob Textures Overhaul: Beta Release
